title: Run(): add options for adding and removing capabilities
body:
Add `RunOptions` and `BuildOptions` flags for modifying the list of granted capabilities from the default.

Default to dropping CAP_NET_RAW.

comments.body: Yes I think the man page should container a list of capabiltiies we are using, and we should just specify  a list in the code rather then relying on the underlying tools to specify a list.
Okay, switching away from using runtime-tools's defaults.
